answer.en: The stars guide the way

interpretation.zh: 天行健，君子以自强不息。——《易经》
interpretation.en: As Heaven maintains vigor through movements, a gentleman should constantly strive for self-improvement. — I Ching

answer.en: When water flows, the channel forms itself

interpretation.zh: 上善若水，水善利万物而不争。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: The highest good is like water; water benefits all things and does not compete. — Tao Te Ching

answer.zh: 阴阳交汇之处，便是转机
answer.en: Where yin and yang converge, there lies the turning point

interpretation.zh: 一阴一阳之谓道。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The alternation of yin and yang is called the Tao. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Accumulate deeply, release gently; wait quietly for flowers to bloom

interpretation.zh: 潜龙勿用，阳气潜藏。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: The hidden dragon does not act; yang energy lies concealed. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: The five elements cycle; the moment has arrived

interpretation.zh: 金木水火土，更贵更贱，以知生死。——《黄帝内经》
interpretation.en: Metal, wood, water, fire, and earth wax and wane; through them one understands life and death. — Yellow Emperor's Inner Canon

answer.en: The wind rises from the tips of green duckweed

interpretation.zh: 履霜，坚冰至。——《易经·坤卦》
interpretation.en: Treading upon frost, solid ice will arrive. — I Ching, Hexagram Kun

answer.zh: 天机不可泄露，顺其自然
answer.en: Heaven's secrets must not be revealed; let nature take its course

interpretation.zh: 道法自然。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: The Tao follows what is natural. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: The Ziwei star stirs; a noble benefactor approaches

interpretation.zh: 飞龙在天，利见大人。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: The flying dragon is in the heavens; it benefits to see the great person. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: Destined by fate; it cannot be forced

interpretation.zh: 不知命，无以为君子也。——《论语》
interpretation.en: One who does not know fate cannot be a gentleman. — The Analects

answer.en: The hexagram reveals: from misfortune, fortune emerges

interpretation.zh: 无平不陂，无往不复。——《易经·泰卦》
interpretation.en: There is no level without incline, no departure without return. — I Ching, Hexagram Tai

answer.zh: 缘分天注定，半点不由人
answer.en: Destiny is written in heaven; not a fraction is controlled by man

interpretation.zh: 同声相应，同气相求。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: Similar voices resonate together; similar energies seek each other. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: Wait until the clouds part to see the bright moon

interpretation.zh: 困，亨，贞，大人吉，无咎。——《易经·困卦》
interpretation.en: Oppression creates success. Perseverance brings good fortune to the great person, no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Kun

answer.en: When Kan and Li harmonize, all things renew

interpretation.zh: 日新之谓盛德。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Daily renewal is called supreme virtue. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The dragon returns to the vast sea; the phoenix perches on the parasol tree

interpretation.zh: 云从龙，风从虎。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: Clouds follow the dragon; winds follow the tiger. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: Heaven and Earth are set; those who follow the Tao prosper

interpretation.zh: 顺天者存，逆天者亡。——《孟子》
interpretation.en: Those who follow Heaven survive; those who go against Heaven perish. — Mencius

answer.en: The Northern Dipper governs death; the Southern Dipper governs life

interpretation.zh: 生生之谓易。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The continuous production of life is called change. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The eight characters are set; karma follows its own course

interpretation.zh: 积善之家，必有余庆。——《易经·坤卦·文言》
interpretation.en: A family that accumulates goodness will surely have surplus blessings. — I Ching, Kun Commentary

answer.en: The four pillars foretell; a great fortune cycle approaches

interpretation.zh: 时乘六龙以御天。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: In due time, ride the six dragons to govern the heavens. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: The Tao of Heaven cycles; whom does the azure sky spare

interpretation.zh: 天道亏盈而益谦。——《易经·谦卦》
interpretation.en: The Tao of Heaven diminishes the full and benefits the humble. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian (Modesty)

answer.en: The Heavenly Noble One secretly lends aid

interpretation.zh: 利见大人，以从贵也。——《易经·讼卦》
interpretation.en: It benefits to see a great person, to follow the noble one. — I Ching, Hexagram Song

answer.en: Sun and moon shine together; yin and yang are in harmony

interpretation.zh: 一阖一辟谓之变，往来不穷谓之通。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: One closing and one opening is called change; going and coming without end is called penetration. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Destiny carries fortune; blessings stretch far and long

interpretation.zh: 积善之家，必有余庆；积不善之家，必有余殃。——《易经·坤卦·文言》
interpretation.en: A family that accumulates goodness will have surplus joy; a family that accumulates evil will have surplus disaster. — I Ching, Kun Commentary

answer.en: Karmic bonds of past lives continue into this life

interpretation.zh: 积土成山，风雨兴焉；积水成渊，蛟龙生焉。——《荀子》
interpretation.en: Accumulate earth to form a mountain, and wind and rain arise; accumulate water to form an abyss, and dragons are born. — Xunzi

answer.en: All six lines are auspicious; all matters proceed smoothly

interpretation.zh: 元亨利贞。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: Sublime success, furthering through perseverance. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: Heaven's net and earth's snare will eventually be broken

interpretation.zh: 天网恢恢，疏而不失。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: Heaven's net is vast; its meshes are wide yet it lets nothing slip through. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: Destiny clashes with Tai Sui; stillness is better than movement

interpretation.zh: 安其身而后动，易其心而后语。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Settle yourself before acting; calm your mind before speaking. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The nine palace flying stars have arrived at an auspicious position

interpretation.zh: 吉人之辞寡，躁人之辞多。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The words of a fortunate person are few; the words of a restless person are many. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Azure Dragon enters your destiny; all things go as wished

interpretation.zh: 大人虎变，其文炳也；君子豹变，其文蔚也。——《易经·革卦》
interpretation.en: The great person changes like a tiger, its markings brilliant; the noble person changes like a leopard, its markings elegant. — I Ching, Hexagram Ge

answer.en: Through the six realms of rebirth, this tribulation has been crossed

interpretation.zh: 剥极必复。——《易经》
interpretation.en: When stripping reaches its extreme, return inevitably follows. — I Ching

answer.en: From the Supreme Ultimate emerge the two polarities; change is coming

interpretation.zh: 易有太极，是生两仪。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: In change there is the Supreme Ultimate, which generates the two polarities. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The White Tiger arrives at the door; guard against hidden arrows

interpretation.zh: 君子以思患而豫防之。——《易经·既济卦》
interpretation.en: The superior person thinks of danger and prepares against it beforehand. — I Ching, Hexagram Ji Ji

answer.en: Fortunate across three lifetimes; supported by noble benefactors

interpretation.zh: 二人同心，其利断金。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: When two people are of one mind, their sharpness can cut through metal. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.zh: 命里有时终须有，命里无时莫强求
answer.en: What is destined to be yours will arrive; what is not, do not force

interpretation.zh: 谦谦君子，卑以自牧也。——《易经·谦卦》
interpretation.en: The humble superior person cultivates himself through modesty. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian (Modesty)

answer.en: The Dark Heavenly Lord guides you through the crossing

interpretation.zh: 谦尊而光，卑而不可逾。——《易经·谦卦》
interpretation.en: Modesty in high position shines brightly; in low position, it cannot be surpassed. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian (Modesty)

answer.en: Heaven and Earth turn; your fortune cycle is arriving

interpretation.zh: 穷则变，变则通，通则久。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: When exhausted, change; when changed, pass through; when passing through, endure. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Vermilion Bird spreads its wings; written matters are favorable

interpretation.zh: 鸣鹤在阴，其子和之。——《易经·中孚卦》
interpretation.en: A calling crane in the shade; its young answer it. — I Ching, Hexagram Zhong Fu

answer.en: Your destiny is extraordinary; you are not one to remain in a pond

interpretation.zh: 或跃在渊，无咎。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: Perhaps leaping in the abyss, no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: The Black Tortoise stands guard; secretly protecting you

interpretation.zh: 劳谦，君子有终，吉。——《易经·谦卦》
interpretation.en: The humble one who labors, the superior person achieves completion, good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian (Modesty)

answer.en: The Peach Blossom star stirs; romantic fate has arrived

interpretation.zh: 咸，亨利贞，取女吉。——《易经·咸卦》
interpretation.en: Influence, success through perseverance; taking a wife brings good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Xian

answer.en: Purple qi comes from the east; an omen of great fortune

interpretation.zh: 黄裳元吉。——《易经·坤卦》
interpretation.en: Yellow garment, supreme good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Kun

answer.en: From the River Chart and Luo Scroll, Heaven's will is made clear

interpretation.zh: 天生神物，圣人则之。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Heaven produces divine things; the sage takes them as a model. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The five elements lack metal; it is advisable to wear precious objects

interpretation.zh: 天地变化，草木蕃。——《易经·坤卦·文言》
interpretation.en: When Heaven and Earth undergo change, grass and trees flourish. — I Ching, Kun Commentary

answer.en: The three stars shine upon you; fortune, prosperity, and longevity are complete

interpretation.zh: 大吉大利，万事亨通。——民间谚语
interpretation.en: Great fortune and great profit; all matters go smoothly. — Chinese Folk Proverb

answer.en: Tribulations are exhausted; misfortune departs and fortune arrives

interpretation.zh: 物不可以终难，故受之以解。——《易经·序卦》
interpretation.en: Things cannot remain in difficulty forever; thus it is followed by deliverance. — I Ching, Sequence of Hexagrams

answer.zh: 七政四余，星辰布局已成
answer.en: The seven luminaries and four extras; the celestial arrangement is set

interpretation.zh: 观乎天文，以察时变。——《易经·贲卦·彖》
interpretation.en: Observe the patterns of heaven to examine the changes of the times. — I Ching, Hexagram Bi, Commentary

answer.en: Destiny carries Heavenly Virtue; misfortune transforms into fortune

interpretation.zh: 自天佑之，吉无不利。——《易经·大有卦》
interpretation.en: Blessed by Heaven, good fortune, nothing that is not beneficial. — I Ching, Hexagram Da You

answer.en: The qi of fortune has opened; ride the wind and break the waves

interpretation.zh: 木道乃行。——《易经·涣卦》
interpretation.en: The way of wood prevails. — I Ching, Hexagram Huan

answer.en: The Heavenly Dipper and Earthly Fiends each have their appointed numbers

interpretation.zh: 天地之数五十有五。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The numbers of Heaven and Earth total fifty-five. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The star of literature shines; scholarly success is at hand

interpretation.zh: 君子以多识前言往行，以畜其德。——《易经·大畜卦》
interpretation.en: The superior person studies the words and deeds of the past to cultivate virtue. — I Ching, Hexagram Da Xu

answer.en: The Supreme Ultimate guards you; a hundred evils cannot invade

interpretation.zh: 直方大，不习无不利。——《易经·坤卦》
interpretation.en: Straight, square, great; without practice, nothing is unfavorable. — I Ching, Hexagram Kun

answer.zh: 先天八卦已定，后天运势将转
answer.en: The pre-heaven eight trigrams are set; post-heaven fortune is about to shift

interpretation.zh: 乾坤其易之缊邪。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Qian and Kun are the storehouse of change. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Heavenly Joy star moves; a happy event is near

interpretation.zh: 和气致祥，乖气致戾。——民间谚语
interpretation.en: Harmonious energy brings auspiciousness; discordant energy brings misfortune. — Chinese Folk Proverb

answer.en: Rahu and Ketu secretly test you

interpretation.zh: 君子以反身修德。——《易经·蹇卦》
interpretation.en: The superior person turns inward and cultivates virtue. — I Ching, Hexagram Jian

answer.en: Three eras and nine periods; fortune shifts now

interpretation.zh: 变则通，通则久。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Change leads to passage; passage leads to endurance. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Destiny encounters the lone star; cultivate good karma

interpretation.zh: 善不积不足以成名，恶不积不足以灭身。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Without accumulating goodness, one cannot establish a name; without accumulating evil, one cannot destroy oneself. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Golden Cabinet star arrives; wealth flows abundantly

interpretation.zh: 富有之谓大业，日新之谓盛德。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Abundance is called great enterprise; daily renewal is called supreme virtue. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The eight characters carry the Canopy star; spiritual gifts transcend the ordinary

interpretation.zh: 形而上者谓之道，形而下者谓之器。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: That which is above form is called Tao; that which is below form is called tool. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The life palace sits upon fortune; a lifetime of stability

interpretation.zh: 家人，利女贞。——《易经·家人卦》
interpretation.en: The family, beneficial for the woman to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Jia Ren

answer.en: The six protective deities secretly guard you

interpretation.zh: 天之所助者顺也。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: What Heaven assists is that which accords with its nature. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The passing year is unfavorable; conceal your light and bide your time

interpretation.zh: 含章可贞。——《易经·坤卦》
interpretation.en: Hidden brilliance, possible perseverance. — I Ching, Hexagram Kun

answer.en: The star of culture shines bright; talent overflows

interpretation.zh: 君子以朋友讲习。——《易经·兑卦》
interpretation.en: The superior person discusses and practices with friends. — I Ching, Hexagram Dui

answer.en: Destiny carries the Traveling Horse; you will roam in all directions

interpretation.zh: 无妄之往，得志也。——《易经·无妄卦》
interpretation.en: Going without falsehood, one's will is fulfilled. — I Ching, Hexagram Wu Wang

answer.en: With Left Assistant and Right Helper stars, benefactors are like clouds

interpretation.zh: 见群龙无首，吉。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: Seeing a group of dragons without a head, good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: The five spirits bring wealth; there is secret assistance

interpretation.zh: 谦亨，天道下济而光明。——《易经·谦卦》
interpretation.en: Modesty creates success; the Tao of Heaven descends to bring light. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian (Modesty)

answer.en: The Heavenly Mechanism star stirs; trust your intuition

interpretation.zh: 知几其神乎。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: To know the seeds of things, is that not divine? — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Thunder and wind press upon each other; transformation is at hand

interpretation.zh: 天地革而四时成。——《易经·革卦》
interpretation.en: Heaven and Earth undergo change, and the four seasons are completed. — I Ching, Hexagram Ge

answer.en: Water and fire are in harmony; achievements reach completion

interpretation.zh: 既济，亨小，利贞，初吉终乱。——《易经·既济卦》
interpretation.en: After completion, small matters succeed; furthering through perseverance. Initially fortunate, eventually disordered. — I Ching, Hexagram Ji Ji

answer.en: Mountain and marsh share their qi; noble ones secretly align

interpretation.zh: 山泽通气，然后能变化。——《易经·说卦》
interpretation.en: Mountain and marsh exchange qi; only then can transformation occur. — I Ching, Discussion of Trigrams

answer.en: Destiny encounters the Heavenly煞; transform it through goodness

interpretation.zh: 积善之家，必有余庆。——《易经·坤卦·文言》
interpretation.en: A family that accumulates goodness will surely have surplus blessings. — I Ching, Kun Commentary

answer.en: Constellations shine upon your destiny; this is heaven's design

interpretation.zh: 天垂象，见吉凶。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Heaven displays signs, revealing good fortune and misfortune. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Heaven and Earth unite; great things can be expected

interpretation.zh: 天地交而万物通也。——《易经·泰卦》
interpretation.en: Heaven and Earth unite, and all things flow in communication. — I Ching, Hexagram Tai

answer.en: Destiny carries the Heavenly Yi star; troubles transform into blessings

interpretation.zh: 鼎，元吉，亨。——《易经·鼎卦》
interpretation.en: The caldron, supreme good fortune, success. — I Ching, Hexagram Ding

answer.en: Secretly aligned with Heaven's heart; there is wondrous purpose

interpretation.zh: 神而明之，存乎其人。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Divine clarity resides within the person. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The earthly branches conceal heavenly stems; hidden mechanisms lie within

interpretation.zh: 探赜索隐，钩深致远。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Explore the mysterious and seek the hidden; draw out the deep and reach the distant. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The five elements generate each other; act in accordance with the flow

interpretation.zh: 水曰润下，火曰炎上，木曰曲直，金曰从革，土爰稼穑。——《尚书·洪范》
interpretation.en: Water moistens downward, fire flames upward, wood bends and straightens, metal yields and transforms, earth grows crops. — Book of Documents

answer.en: Heavenly and earthly unions; marriage is heaven-made

interpretation.zh: 有天地然后有万物，有万物然后有男女。——《易经·序卦》
interpretation.en: There is Heaven and Earth, then all things; there are all things, then male and female. — I Ching, Sequence of Hexagrams

answer.en: Destiny carries the Kui Gang star; your character is resolute

interpretation.zh: 大过，栋桡，利有攸往，亨。——《易经·大过卦》
interpretation.en: Preponderance of the great, the ridgepole sags; beneficial to have somewhere to go, success. — I Ching, Hexagram Da Guo

answer.en: The Azure Dragon turns its head; old matters resurface

interpretation.zh: 无平不陂，无往不复，艰贞无咎。——《易经·泰卦》
interpretation.en: No level without slope, no departure without return; perseverance in difficulty brings no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Tai

answer.en: Destiny encounters the Peach Blossom; waves surge in the sea of love

interpretation.zh: 渐，女归吉，利贞。——《易经·渐卦》
interpretation.en: Development, a maiden marries, good fortune, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Jian

answer.en: Feng shui is balanced; the pattern is established

interpretation.zh: 正其谊不谋其利，明其道不计其功。——《汉书》
interpretation.en: Uphold righteousness without seeking profit; illuminate the Tao without calculating gain. — Book of Han

answer.en: The Heavenly Physician star shines; illness naturally dissolves

interpretation.zh: 损，有孚，元吉，无咎。——《易经·损卦》
interpretation.en: Decrease with sincerity, supreme good fortune, no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Sun

answer.en: Destiny carries the Yang Blade; your edge is fully revealed

interpretation.zh: 大壮，利贞。——《易经·大壮卦》
interpretation.en: Great power, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Da Zhuang

answer.en: Ziwei shines from above; the fortune star arrives at the door

interpretation.zh: 吉事有祥。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Auspicious events have their omens. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Destiny carries the Red Phoenix star; marriage fate approaches

interpretation.zh: 男女正，天地之大义也。——《易经·家人卦》
interpretation.en: Proper relations between male and female are the great righteousness of Heaven and Earth. — I Ching, Hexagram Jia Ren

answer.en: The heavenly dog devours the moon; a temporary eclipse

interpretation.zh: 明入地中，明夷。——《易经·明夷卦》
interpretation.en: Light enters the earth; darkening of the light. — I Ching, Hexagram Ming Yi

answer.en: The triple harmony formation is complete; benefactors extend help

interpretation.zh: 三人行则损一人，一人行则得其友。——《易经·损卦》
interpretation.en: When three walk together, one is lost; when one walks alone, a friend is found. — I Ching, Hexagram Sun

answer.en: Destiny carries emptiness; you must enrich your inner self

interpretation.zh: 虚而不屈，动而愈出。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: Empty yet inexhaustible, in motion it produces ever more. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: Stars secretly align; the moment of opportunity has come

interpretation.zh: 几者动之微，吉之先见者也。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Seeds are the subtle beginnings of movement, the first signs of good fortune. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Jade Hall noble one transforms misfortune into fortune

interpretation.zh: 贵而无位，高而无民，贤人在下位而无辅。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: Honored but without position, elevated but without people, the wise one below without support. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: Destiny meets the General star; a leader's aura

interpretation.zh: 师贞，丈人吉，无咎。——《易经·师卦》
interpretation.en: The army perseveres; the elder brings good fortune, no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Shi

answer.en: The earthly branches form six harmonies; all matters are balanced

interpretation.zh: 保合大和，乃利贞。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: Maintaining the great harmony is beneficial and steadfast. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: Destiny encounters the Hooked Chen; matters are entangled

interpretation.zh: 屯，元亨利贞，勿用有攸往，利建侯。——《易经·屯卦》
interpretation.en: Difficulty at the beginning, supreme success through perseverance; do not advance, beneficial to establish lords. — I Ching, Hexagram Zhun

answer.en: Heaven rewards diligence; no effort is in vain

interpretation.zh: 天行健，君子以自强不息。——《易经》
interpretation.en: As Heaven maintains vigor through movements, a gentleman should constantly strive for self-improvement. — I Ching

answer.en: Destiny carries the Store of Fortune star; food and clothing are secure

interpretation.zh: 井，改邑不改井，无丧无得。——《易经·井卦》
interpretation.en: The well, the town may change but the well remains; neither loss nor gain. — I Ching, Hexagram Jing

answer.zh: 先天之数已定，后天可改
answer.en: Pre-heaven numbers are fixed; post-heaven can be changed

interpretation.zh: 易，穷则变，变则通。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: In change, when exhausted, transform; when transformed, pass through. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Bathe in starlight; spiritual awareness grows

interpretation.zh: 洗心曰退藏于密。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Cleansing the mind is called retreating into hidden depths. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Destiny meets the Heavenly Horse; distant places bring benefit

interpretation.zh: 旅，小亨，旅贞吉。——《易经·旅卦》
interpretation.en: The wanderer, small success, the wanderer perseveres in good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Lu

answer.en: In a place of six clashes, change brings passage

interpretation.zh: 革，已日乃孚，元亨利贞，悔亡。——《易经·革卦》
interpretation.en: Revolution, on your own day you are believed, supreme success, regret vanishes. — I Ching, Hexagram Ge

answer.en: Destiny carries indirect wealth; unexpected joys

interpretation.zh: 大有，元亨。——《易经·大有卦》
interpretation.en: Possession in great measure, supreme success. — I Ching, Hexagram Da You

answer.en: The four pillars have roots; the foundation is solid

interpretation.zh: 根深则叶茂。——民间谚语
interpretation.en: When the roots are deep, the leaves flourish. — Chinese Folk Proverb

answer.en: Heaven's mechanism subtly reveals itself; observe quietly and await change

interpretation.zh: 知变化之道者，其知神之所为乎。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: One who knows the way of change, does one not know the workings of the divine? — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Lake upon mountain brings mutual influence; hearts connect

interpretation.zh: 咸，感也。柔上而刚下，二气感应以相与。——《易经·咸卦·彖》
interpretation.en: Xian means influence. The gentle above and the firm below, the two energies resonate and join. — I Ching, Hexagram Xian, Commentary

answer.en: Retire from the world without distress; await the right moment

interpretation.zh: 遁，亨，小利贞。——《易经·遁卦》
interpretation.en: Retreat, success, small advantage in perseverance. — I Ching, Hexagram Dun

answer.en: Thunder sounds first; a noble person will speak up

interpretation.zh: 震，亨。震来虩虩，笑言哑哑。——《易经·震卦》
interpretation.en: Arousing, success. Thunder arrives with fear, then laughter and speech. — I Ching, Hexagram Zhen

answer.en: The gentle wind of Xun arrives; yielding brings good fortune

interpretation.zh: 巽，小亨，利有攸往，利见大人。——《易经·巽卦》
interpretation.en: Gentle penetration, small success, beneficial to have somewhere to go, beneficial to see a great person. — I Ching, Hexagram Xun

answer.en: The mountain of Gen brings stillness; guard rather than advance

interpretation.zh: 艮其背，不获其身；行其庭，不见其人，无咎。——《易经·艮卦》
interpretation.en: Keeping still the back, one does not see the body; walking in the courtyard, one does not see the person, no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Gen

answer.en: The hexagram of Gu appears; old corruptions must be removed

interpretation.zh: 蛊，元亨，利涉大川。——《易经·蛊卦》
interpretation.en: Correction, supreme success, beneficial to cross the great river. — I Ching, Hexagram Gu

answer.en: The hexagram Lin reveals; the great tide has arrived

interpretation.zh: 临，元亨利贞，至于八月有凶。——《易经·临卦》
interpretation.en: Approach, supreme success, furthering through perseverance. By the eighth month, there will be misfortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Lin

answer.en: Observe the way of Heaven; grasp the actions of Heaven

interpretation.zh: 观，盥而不荐，有孚颙若。——《易经·观卦》
interpretation.en: Contemplation, the ablution has been performed but the offering has not, sincerity and reverence. — I Ching, Hexagram Guan

answer.en: The hexagram Shihe appears; obstacles can be broken

interpretation.zh: 噬嗑，亨，利用狱。——《易经·噬嗑卦》
interpretation.en: Biting through, success, beneficial for legal matters. — I Ching, Hexagram Shihe

answer.en: The hexagram Bi appears; elegance and substance are in balance

interpretation.zh: 贲，亨，小利有攸往。——《易经·贲卦》
interpretation.en: Grace, success, small advantage in having somewhere to go. — I Ching, Hexagram Bi

answer.en: The hexagram Fu signals; one yang line returns

interpretation.zh: 复，亨，出入无疾，朋来无咎。——《易经·复卦》
interpretation.en: Return, success, going out and coming in without haste, friends arrive without blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Fu

answer.en: The way of nourishment; occupy the correct position with proper form

interpretation.zh: 颐，贞吉，观颐，自求口实。——《易经·颐卦》
interpretation.en: Nourishment, perseverance brings good fortune. Observe nourishment, seek sustenance for yourself. — I Ching, Hexagram Yi

answer.en: The danger of Kan water; wait for the right moment

interpretation.zh: 习坎，有孚，维心亨，行有尚。——《易经·坎卦》
interpretation.en: The abysmal water repeated, sincerity, only the heart can penetrate, action brings esteem. — I Ching, Hexagram Kan

answer.en: The brightness of Li fire; the path ahead is luminous

interpretation.zh: 离，利贞，亨，畜牝牛，吉。——《易经·离卦》
interpretation.en: The clinging fire, beneficial to persevere, success, rearing the cow brings good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Li

answer.en: Measure with proper restraint; exceeding is as bad as falling short

interpretation.zh: 节，亨，苦节不可贞。——《易经·节卦》
interpretation.en: Limitation, success, but bitter limitation cannot be persevered in. — I Ching, Hexagram Jie

answer.en: The sincerity of Zhong Fu; honesty moves Heaven and Earth

interpretation.zh: 中孚，豚鱼吉，利涉大川，利贞。——《易经·中孚卦》
interpretation.en: Inner truth, even the pig and fish bring good fortune, beneficial to cross the great river, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Zhong Fu

answer.en: The hexagram Xiao Guo appears; act with humility

interpretation.zh: 小过，亨，利贞，可小事，不可大事。——《易经·小过卦》
interpretation.en: Preponderance of the small, success, beneficial to persevere, small matters can be done, great matters cannot. — I Ching, Hexagram Xiao Guo

answer.en: The hexagram Gui Mei appears; proceed step by step

interpretation.zh: 归妹，征凶，无攸利。——《易经·归妹卦》
interpretation.en: The marrying maiden, advancing brings misfortune, nothing is beneficial. — I Ching, Hexagram Gui Mei

answer.en: The fullness of hexagram Feng; bright and upright

interpretation.zh: 丰，亨，王假之，勿忧，宜日中。——《易经·丰卦》
interpretation.en: Abundance, success, the king approaches, do not be anxious, the time is midday. — I Ching, Hexagram Feng

answer.en: The hexagram Huan signals dispersal; hearts must be gathered

interpretation.zh: 涣，亨，王假有庙，利涉大川，利贞。——《易经·涣卦》
interpretation.en: Dispersion, success, the king approaches the temple, beneficial to cross the great river, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Huan

answer.en: Ascend the steps one by one; advance in proper sequence

interpretation.zh: 升，元亨，用见大人，勿恤，南征吉。——《易经·升卦》
interpretation.en: Pushing upward, supreme success, see the great person, do not grieve, southward march brings good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Sheng

answer.en: The power of gathering; united wills form a fortress

interpretation.zh: 萃，亨，王假有庙，利见大人，亨，利贞。——《易经·萃卦》
interpretation.en: Gathering together, success, the king approaches the temple, beneficial to see the great person, success, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Cui

answer.en: The hexagram Jin signals progress; like the sun rising

interpretation.zh: 晋，康侯用锡马蕃庶，昼日三接。——《易经·晋卦》
interpretation.en: Progress, the prince is blessed with horses in abundance, received three times in a single day. — I Ching, Hexagram Jin

answer.en: The darkness of Ming Yi; conceal your light and cultivate virtue

interpretation.zh: 明夷，利艰贞。——《易经·明夷卦》
interpretation.en: Darkening of the light, beneficial to persevere in difficulty. — I Ching, Hexagram Ming Yi

answer.en: The hexagram Jia Ren appears; cultivate order within the family

interpretation.zh: 家人，利女贞。——《易经·家人卦》
interpretation.en: The family, beneficial for the woman to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Jia Ren

answer.en: Obstruction lies ahead; cultivate virtue and conduct

interpretation.zh: 蹇，利西南，不利东北，利见大人，贞吉。——《易经·蹇卦》
interpretation.en: Obstruction, beneficial in the southwest, not beneficial in the northeast, beneficial to see the great person, perseverance brings good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Jian

answer.en: The hexagram Jie brings release; ice melts and tiles crumble

interpretation.zh: 解，利西南，无所往，其来复吉。——《易经·解卦》
interpretation.en: Deliverance, beneficial in the southwest, if there is nowhere to go, returning brings good fortune. — I Ching, Hexagram Jie

answer.en: The way of decrease and increase; first decrease, then increase

interpretation.zh: 损，有孚，元吉，无咎，可贞，利有攸往。——《易经·损卦》
interpretation.en: Decrease with sincerity, supreme good fortune, no blame, possible perseverance, beneficial to have somewhere to go. — I Ching, Hexagram Sun

answer.en: The joy of hexagram Yi; Heaven bestows and Earth produces

interpretation.zh: 益，利有攸往，利涉大川。——《易经·益卦》
interpretation.en: Increase, beneficial to have somewhere to go, beneficial to cross the great river. — I Ching, Hexagram Yi

answer.en: The hexagram Kuai shows resolute judgment; act decisively

interpretation.zh: 夬，扬于王庭，孚号，有厉。——《易经·夬卦》
interpretation.en: Breakthrough, proclamation in the royal court, sincere warning, there is danger. — I Ching, Hexagram Guai

answer.en: The hexagram Gou signals encounter; meeting unexpectedly

interpretation.zh: 姤，女壮，勿用取女。——《易经·姤卦》
interpretation.en: Coming to meet, the maiden is powerful, do not marry her. — I Ching, Hexagram Gou

answer.en: The wellspring never runs dry; nourishing without end

interpretation.zh: 井，改邑不改井，无丧无得，往来井井。——《易经·井卦》
interpretation.en: The well, the town may change but the well remains, neither loss nor gain, people come and go drawing from the well. — I Ching, Hexagram Jing

answer.en: Renew the cauldron and discard the old; all things are made new

interpretation.zh: 鼎，元吉，亨。——《易经·鼎卦》
interpretation.en: The caldron, supreme good fortune, success. — I Ching, Hexagram Ding

answer.en: Gradually entering the best state; step by step with care

interpretation.zh: 渐，女归吉，利贞。——《易经·渐卦》
interpretation.en: Development, a maiden marries, good fortune, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Jian

answer.en: Gentle and penetrating; use softness to overcome hardness

interpretation.zh: 柔顺利贞。——《易经·坤卦·文言》
interpretation.en: Yielding and gentle, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Kun Commentary

answer.en: The hexagram Dui brings joy; keep joy in your heart

interpretation.zh: 兑，亨，利贞。——《易经·兑卦》
interpretation.en: Joy, success, beneficial to persevere. — I Ching, Hexagram Dui

answer.en: Disperse then gather; break then establish

interpretation.zh: 穷则变，变则通，通则久。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: When exhausted, change; when changed, pass through; when passing through, endure. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The eight trigrams interact; yin and yang push each other forward

interpretation.zh: 刚柔相摩，八卦相荡。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The firm and the gentle rub against each other; the eight trigrams interact. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Heaven's way has constancy; it does not exist for a sage

interpretation.zh: 天行有常，不为尧存，不为桀亡。——《荀子·天论》
interpretation.en: Heaven's way has constancy, it does not exist for Yao, nor perish for Jie. — Xunzi, Discourse on Heaven

answer.en: The five elements overcome each other; within control lies transformation

interpretation.zh: 木得金而伐，火得水而灭，土得木而达。——《黄帝内经·素问》
interpretation.en: Wood is cut by metal, fire is extinguished by water, earth is penetrated by wood. — Yellow Emperor's Inner Canon, Basic Questions

answer.en: Through Qi Men Dun Jia, the hidden opportunity is grasped

interpretation.zh: 机不可失，时不再来。——《新唐书》
interpretation.en: The opportunity must not be lost; the time will not come again. — New Book of Tang

answer.en: Destiny holds a tribulation; transform the tribulation into destiny

interpretation.zh: 祸兮福之所倚，福兮祸之所伏。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: Misfortune is what fortune depends upon; fortune is where misfortune hides. — Tao Te Ching

answer.zh: 子午相冲，动荡之中寻平衡
answer.en: Zi and Wu clash; seek balance within turbulence

interpretation.zh: 动静相因，刚柔相济。——《黄帝内经·素问》
interpretation.en: Movement and stillness depend on each other; hardness and gentleness complement each other. — Yellow Emperor's Inner Canon, Basic Questions

answer.en: The numbers of the Supreme Mystery; fortune and misfortune are equally balanced

interpretation.zh: 吉凶者，失得之象也。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Good fortune and misfortune are the images of loss and gain. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Heaven's origin is one qi; all things share the same source

interpretation.zh: 通天下一气耳。——《庄子》
interpretation.en: The whole universe is but one qi. — Zhuangzi

answer.en: The Six Ren divination shows misfortune first, then good fortune

interpretation.zh: 先否后喜。——《易经·否卦》
interpretation.en: First standstill, then joy. — I Ching, Hexagram Pi

answer.en: The Jia Zi cycle turns; a new beginning

interpretation.zh: 终则有始，天行也。——《易经·蛊卦·彖》
interpretation.en: When the end is reached, a new beginning comes; this is the way of Heaven. — I Ching, Hexagram Gu, Commentary

answer.en: The heavenly plate and earthly plate resonate above and below

interpretation.zh: 本乎天者亲上，本乎地者亲下。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: That which is rooted in Heaven inclines upward; that which is rooted in Earth inclines downward. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: The gateway of the mysterious female; the root of Heaven and Earth

interpretation.zh: 谷神不死，是谓玄牝，玄牝之门，是谓天地根。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: The spirit of the valley never dies; it is called the mysterious female. The gateway of the mysterious female is called the root of Heaven and Earth. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: The six children of Qian and Kun; each has its appointed role

interpretation.zh: 乾，天也，故称乎父；坤，地也，故称乎母。——《易经·说卦》
interpretation.en: Qian is Heaven, thus called father; Kun is Earth, thus called mother. — I Ching, Discussion of Trigrams

answer.en: Heavenly stems and earthly branches; time and space intertwine

interpretation.zh: 天有好生之德。——《尚书》
interpretation.en: Heaven has the virtue of loving all life. — Book of Documents

answer.en: The twenty-four mountains; a favorable direction

interpretation.zh: 方以类聚，物以群分，吉凶生矣。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Things of like kind gather together; beings are divided into groups; from this, fortune and misfortune arise. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The nine stars fly and alight; qi and fortune circulate

interpretation.zh: 变化不测之谓神。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: What changes unpredictably is called divine. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The five elements in your birth chart; harmony is most precious

interpretation.zh: 和实生物，同则不继。——《国语·郑语》
interpretation.en: Harmony generates things; sameness does not continue. — Discourses of the States

answer.en: The number of the great expansion is fifty-five

interpretation.zh: 大衍之数五十，其用四十有九。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The number of the great expansion is fifty; its use is forty-nine. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The life palace holds the Heavenly Treasury; wealth and honor are complete

interpretation.zh: 富有之谓大业。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Abundance is called great enterprise. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Heavenly Beam star shines; misfortune is transformed into fortune

interpretation.zh: 天道福善祸淫。——《尚书·汤诰》
interpretation.en: The way of Heaven blesses the good and punishes the wicked. — Book of Documents

answer.en: Destiny encounters the lone star; cultivate virtue alone

interpretation.zh: 独学而无友，则孤陋而寡闻。——《礼记·学记》
interpretation.en: Studying alone without friends leads to narrow views and limited knowledge. — Book of Rites, Record of Education

answer.en: The Heavenly Harmony star moves; peace and health follow

interpretation.zh: 和气致祥。——民间谚语
interpretation.en: Harmonious energy brings auspiciousness. — Chinese Folk Proverb

answer.en: The Seven Killings star arrives; break then establish

interpretation.zh: 置之死地而后生。——《孙子兵法》
interpretation.en: Place them in deadly peril and they will survive. — The Art of War

answer.en: The Po Jun star signals; destroy the old and establish the new

interpretation.zh: 革而去之，亦天之道也。——《易经·革卦·象》
interpretation.en: To reform and remove is also the way of Heaven. — I Ching, Hexagram Ge, Image

answer.en: The Lian Zhen star shines; hold firm to righteousness

interpretation.zh: 贞，正也。——《易经》
interpretation.en: Perseverance means correctness. — I Ching

answer.en: The Wu Qu star arrives; be resolute and decisive

interpretation.zh: 刚健笃实辉光，日新其德。——《易经·大畜卦·彖》
interpretation.en: Firm, strong, sincere, and substantial with brilliance; daily renewing its virtue. — I Ching, Hexagram Da Xu, Commentary

answer.en: The Tan Lang star signals; desires must be restrained

interpretation.zh: 知足不辱，知止不殆。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: He who knows contentment suffers no disgrace; he who knows when to stop meets no danger. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: The Ju Men star signals; guard against verbal disputes

interpretation.zh: 言行，君子之枢机。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Words and actions are the hinge and trigger of the superior person. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Heavenly Minister star shines; capable assistance is at hand

interpretation.zh: 二人同心，其利断金。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: When two people are of one mind, their sharpness can cut through metal. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Sun star shines bright; the future is like brocade

interpretation.zh: 大明终始，六位时成。——《易经·乾卦·彖》
interpretation.en: The great brightness begins and ends; the six positions are completed in their time. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian, Commentary

answer.en: The Moon star shines; within gentleness there is strength

interpretation.zh: 柔进而上行。——《易经·晋卦·彖》
interpretation.en: The gentle advances and moves upward. — I Ching, Hexagram Jin, Commentary

answer.en: Destiny carries the Heavenly Punishment star; discipline yourself through practice

interpretation.zh: 君子以慎刑罚。——《易经·旅卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person is careful with punishments. — I Ching, Hexagram Lu, Image

answer.en: The Heavenly Yao star moves; interpersonal harmony is favorable

interpretation.zh: 同声相应，同气相求。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: Similar voices resonate; similar energies seek each other. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: The Robbery Sha enters your destiny; act with caution

interpretation.zh: 君子以恐惧修省。——《易经·震卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person is fearful and cultivates self-examination. — I Ching, Hexagram Zhen, Image

answer.en: Wen Chang transforms to honor; fame spreads far and wide

interpretation.zh: 君子以立不易方。——《易经·恒卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person stands firm and does not change direction. — I Ching, Hexagram Heng, Image

answer.en: Wen Qu transforms to obstacle; be careful with documents

interpretation.zh: 修辞立其诚，所以居业也。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: Cultivate words to establish sincerity, thereby maintaining one's enterprise. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: Destiny carries the Heavenly Horse; seek fortune through movement

interpretation.zh: 君子以向晦入宴息。——《易经·随卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person rests at nightfall. — I Ching, Hexagram Sui, Image

answer.en: The Red Phoenix star moves; a happy occasion draws near

interpretation.zh: 有天地然后有万物，有万物然后有男女。——《易经·序卦》
interpretation.en: There is Heaven and Earth, then all things; there are all things, then male and female. — I Ching, Sequence of Hexagrams

answer.en: The Heavenly Weeping star arrives; adjust your state of mind

interpretation.zh: 君子以惩忿窒欲。——《易经·损卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person restrains anger and curbs desires. — I Ching, Hexagram Sun, Image

answer.en: The Dragon Virtue star shines; blessings run deep

interpretation.zh: 龙德而隐者也。——《易经·乾卦·文言》
interpretation.en: One who possesses the virtue of the dragon yet remains hidden. — I Ching, Qian Commentary

answer.en: The Phoenix Pavilion star arrives; talent surpasses all others

interpretation.zh: 君子以虚受人。——《易经·咸卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person receives others with an open mind. — I Ching, Hexagram Xian, Image

answer.en: The Resolving Deity star shines; difficulties resolve themselves

interpretation.zh: 天地解而雷雨作，雷雨作而百果草木皆甲坼。——《易经·解卦·彖》
interpretation.en: Heaven and Earth release, and thunder and rain arise; when thunder and rain arise, all fruits and plants burst from their shells. — I Ching, Hexagram Jie, Commentary

answer.en: The Heavenly Shaman star arrives; spiritual awareness opens

interpretation.zh: 精义入神，以致用也。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Entering into the spirit of the most refined, in order to put it to practical use. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Heavenly Moon star shines; a noble person secretly assists

interpretation.zh: 天道无亲，常与善人。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: The way of Heaven has no favorites; it constantly associates with the good. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: The Heavenly Void star moves; thinking expands broadly

interpretation.zh: 仰以观于天文，俯以察于地理。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Looking upward to observe the heavens, looking downward to examine the earth. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The emptiness of the ten-day cycle; seek substance within the void

interpretation.zh: 大象无形。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: The great form has no shape. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: Destiny meets the Canopy star; alone you grasp the true meaning

interpretation.zh: 独与天地精神往来。——《庄子》
interpretation.en: Alone, one communes with the spirit of Heaven and Earth. — Zhuangzi

answer.en: The twelve stages of life cycle; qi and fortune begin to sprout

interpretation.zh: 万物始萌，理不可绝。——《黄帝内经·素问》
interpretation.en: When all things begin to sprout, the principle cannot be cut off. — Yellow Emperor's Inner Canon, Basic Questions

answer.en: The qi of imperial prosperity; the momentum is unstoppable

interpretation.zh: 飞龙在天，利见大人。——《易经·乾卦》
interpretation.en: The flying dragon is in the heavens; it benefits to see the great person. — I Ching, Hexagram Qian

answer.en: The tomb and treasury sign; conceal your light and store your energy

interpretation.zh: 藏器于身，待时而动。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Store your instruments within yourself; wait for the right time to act. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: Life emerges from the absolute end; the turning point has come

interpretation.zh: 物极必反。——《易经》
interpretation.en: When things reach their extreme, they must return. — I Ching

answer.en: The way of embryonic nourishment; gather strength and await the moment

interpretation.zh: 万物皆有其时。——《黄帝内经·素问》
interpretation.en: All things have their appointed time. — Yellow Emperor's Inner Canon, Basic Questions

answer.en: Destiny encounters the Five Ghosts; use righteousness to overcome evil

interpretation.zh: 正胜邪则天清明。——《淮南子》
interpretation.en: When righteousness overcomes evil, the heavens become clear and bright. — Huainanzi

answer.en: The Three Marvels noble stars; an extraordinary pattern

interpretation.zh: 出奇制胜。——《孙子兵法》
interpretation.en: Achieve victory through surprise. — The Art of War

answer.en: The Ten Gods lend assistance; the path of fortune opens wide

interpretation.zh: 天与之，人与之。——《孟子》
interpretation.en: Heaven grants it, and people grant it. — Mencius

answer.en: The Eating God generates wealth; talent transforms into gain

interpretation.zh: 备物致用，立成器以为天下利。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: Prepare things for use, establish completed instruments to benefit the world. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Hurting Officer paired with the Seal; transform obstacles into assets

interpretation.zh: 尺蠖之屈，以求信也；龙蛇之蛰，以存身也。——《易经·系辞》
interpretation.en: The inchworm bends to extend itself; dragons and snakes hibernate to preserve themselves. — I Ching, Appended Explanations

answer.en: The Proper Official protects you; steady rise within stability

interpretation.zh: 君子以正位凝命。——《易经·鼎卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person maintains correct position and consolidates destiny. — I Ching, Hexagram Ding, Image

answer.en: Indirect wealth enters the destiny; unexpected fortune approaches

interpretation.zh: 不出户庭，无咎。——《易经·节卦》
interpretation.en: Not going out of the door and courtyard, no blame. — I Ching, Hexagram Jie

answer.en: The Proper Seal protects; misfortune transforms into fortune

interpretation.zh: 大吉大利。——《易经》
interpretation.en: Supreme good fortune and great profit. — I Ching

answer.en: The Indirect Official carries authority; power manifests naturally

interpretation.zh: 君子以制数度，议德行。——《易经·节卦·象》
interpretation.en: The superior person regulates measures and discusses moral conduct. — I Ching, Hexagram Jie, Image

answer.en: The Shoulder-to-Shoulder star brings help; walk together for mutual success

interpretation.zh: 丽泽，兑，君子以朋友讲习。——《易经·兑卦·象》
interpretation.en: Two lakes joined together, joy; the superior person discusses and studies with friends. — I Ching, Hexagram Dui, Image
